@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+//! Platform-specific networking primitives.
+//!
+//! This module will contain io_uring/epoll/kqueue/iocp implementations in Phase 1.
+//! For Phase 0, we rely on std::net wrappers.
+
+#[cfg(target_os = "linux")]
+pub mod linux {}
+
+#[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
+pub mod macos {}
+
+#[cfg(target_os = "windows")]
+pub mod windows {}
